fields.name: classes
fields.label: Variant
fields.description: Select a style variant for the calculator teaser

fields.name: col1_heading
fields.label: Section Heading
fields.description: Main heading above the teaser cards (e.g. 'Calculator')

fields.name: col1_description
fields.label: Section Description
fields.description: Subtext below the heading (e.g. 'Plan your loan EMI and check loan amount eligibility.')

fields.name: col1_image
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Background image for the teaser card

fields.name: col1_imageAlt
fields.label: Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible alt text for the background image

fields.name: col1_heading
fields.label: Card Heading
fields.description: Title displayed on the card (e.g. 'EMI Calculator')

fields.name: col1_description
fields.label: Card Description
fields.description: Optional short description below the heading

fields.name: col1_ctaText
fields.label: CTA Button Text
fields.description: Button label (e.g. 'Try Now'). Click opens the calculator modal.
